invite.title: Invitation
invite.username_description: This will be your Matrix chat ID. Choose wisely - changing it later will erase your message history.
invite.username_too_short: Username must be at least 3 characters
invite.username_too_long: Username must be at most 30 characters
invite.username_invalid_chars: Only letters, numbers, dots, underscores, and hyphens allowed
invite.success_message: You have been successfully registered and {inviter} has been added to your partners
invite.save_credentials_warning: IMPORTANT: Save these credentials! They are shown only once.
invite.partner_added_message: {inviter} has been added to your partners list
invite.error_username_taken_matrix: Username is already taken in chat system
invite.error_bad_request: Invalid invitation link. Please check the URL.
invite.error_internal: Internal server error. Please try again later.
